name: Landing — Service Business
description: Full landing page for service businesses (contractors, cleaners, consultants, agencies). Composes hero + social proof + services + process + testimonials + FAQ + final CTA.

heroTitle.label: Hero headline
heroTitle.default: You run the business. We hold up your site.

heroBody.label: Hero supporting text
heroBody.default: Custom WordPress sites built on Bedrock, monitored daily, and maintained monthly — so your site stays fast, secure, and on-brand without you thinking about it.

logoWallTitle.label: Logo wall title
logoWallTitle.default: Trusted by small businesses across the region

servicesSubtitle.label: Services subtitle
servicesSubtitle.default: Pick a service, or let us build you a full package

processSubtitle.label: Process subtitle
processSubtitle.default: From kickoff to live site in four simple steps

ctaSubtitle.label: Final CTA subtitle
ctaSubtitle.default: Get a custom site built by people who actually maintain it afterward.
